metadata.title: Upgrade the Firewall to PAN-OS 11.0 from Panorama
metadata.description:
Upgrade managed firewall to PAN-OS 10.2 from the Panorama™
management server.
metadata.keywords: Strata, Next-Generation Firewall, Panorama, Upgrade-Downgrade, 11.0 (EoL), Non-Cloud, PANW Yellow Theme, PAN-OS Upgrade Guide, PAN-OS, Network Security
